title: DTD Item Name
text: DTD Item Name This field lists the DTD items that are direct children of the tree node selected in the tree view. DTD items include elements representing Uniface fields or entities, their attributes, and the multiplicity operator of elements. The operator determines how many times an element is allowed to occur inside its parent element. Table 1. XML Multiplicity Operators Operator Description * The element may occur zero, once, or many times within its parent element. ? The element may occur zero or once within its parent element. + The element may occur once or many times within its parent element. No operator The element must always occur once within its parent element. Click the DTD Item Name button to sort the DTD items alphabetically. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
